post.excerpt: Cloudflare’s Gen 12 server is the most powerful and power efficient server that we have deployed to date. Through sensitivity analysis, we found that Cloudflare workloads continue to scale with higher core count and higher CPU frequency, as well as achieving a significant boost in performance with larger L3 cache per core.
post.title: Analysis of the EPYC 145% performance gain in Cloudflare Gen 12 servers
